CAN CIRC 1.comment: 0: BCM cannot transmit message                            1: can transmit message

CAN CIRC 2.comment: 0: BCM cannot receive message from ECM            1: can receive message from ECM

CAN CIRC 4.comment: 0: BCM cannot receive message from METER        1: can receive message from METER

CAN CIRC 6.comment: 0: BCM cannot receive message from ABS            1: can receive message from ABS

CAN CIRC 7.comment: 0: BCM cannot receive message from CLIM            1: can receive message from CLIM

CAN CIRC 8.comment: 0: BCM cannot receive message from AIRBAG      1: can receive message from AIRBAG

CDL Output.comment: une sortie de la BCM pilotant les moteurs de portes

AD I Fr Int Wiper.comment: Reading direct AD value of I_FR_INT_WIPER

AD Temp.comment: Reading direct AD Input of external temperature sensor

AD Turn L.comment: HW return line : analog value of O_L_BULBS

AD Turn R.comment: HW return line : analog value of O_R_BULBS

IO CAN Circ 1.comment: 0 = BCM can not transmit message,  1 = BCM can transmit message

IO CAN Circ 2.comment: 0 = BCM can not receive from ECM,  1 = BCM can receive from ECM

IO CAN Circ 4.comment: 0 = BCM can not receive from METER,  1 = BCM can receive from METER

IO CAN Circ 6.comment: 0 = BCM can not receive from ABS,  1 = BCM can receive from ABS

IO CAN Circ 7.comment: 0 = BCM can not receive from Clim,  1 = BCM can receive from Clim

IO CAN Circ 8.comment: 0 = BCM can not receive from Airbag,  1 = BCM can receive from Airbag

Light Request By Light Sensor.comment: 0 = pas de lumiere demandée; 1 = lumiere demandée

RC Lock From Outside.comment: 1 if the last action of locking come from RF.

RC Resync In Progress.comment: 1 if key is resynchronised with next authentification

Reset Counter0.comment: Reset du calculateur de toutes origines Value: 0 to 255
